---
title: "Week 05"
---

::: {style="color: #F66D7A"}
### Monday (3/09)
:::

**Topics**

-   LoTUS
-   Geometric and Negative Binomial Distributions

**Daily assignment**

To be completed and submitted to Canvas by 9:00am

-   Daily assignment

**Class activity**

-   Class activity

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: {style="color: #F66D7A"}
### Wednesday (3/11)
:::

**Topics**

-   Indicator variables
-   Fundamental Bridge

**Daily assignment**

To be completed and submitted to Canvas by 9:00am

-   Daily assignment

**Class activity**

-   Class activity

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: {style="color: #F66D7A"}
### Friday (3/13)
:::

**Topics**

None!

**Daily assignment**

None!

**Class activity**

None!
